product_depth.justification: All 6 core sections with SE-specific content. Demo-led, POC-driven, solution design, technical discovery, competitive bake-off methodologies. Demo readiness verification gates.

functionality.justification: Criteria names match index skill. 4 criteria with 0-5 anchors. Methodologies cover all 3 specified plus 2 additional. Anti-patterns reference correct criteria.

visual_design.justification: Section formatting consistent with harness-sales and harness-tm patterns.

code_quality.justification: YAML frontmatter valid. Security in checklists (customer data handling, environment data leak). No broken references.

contract_checks.evidence: All 6 sections present with SE-specific content.
4 criteria with 0-5 anchors: demo_completeness, technical_validation, solution_documentation, integration_clarity.
Demo-led, POC-driven, solution design methodologies present plus technical discovery and competitive bake-off.

feature_evidence.reason: All 5 verification steps pass: file exists, 6 core sections, 4 criteria with 0-5 anchors, demo-led/POC-driven/solution design methodologies, customer environment data protection in checklists and anti-patterns.

internal_consistency.justification: Criteria match index skill. Anti-patterns reference correct criteria.

intentionality.justification: Methodologies reflect real SE workflows. Vaporware demo anti-pattern addresses real industry problem.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: An SE could use these checklists to prepare demos and POCs.
